images.caption:
Figure 1:Aggregate Performance across Speech-to-Text Benchmarks.The average score represents the holistic capabilities of each model computed over 8 distinct reasoning and perception benchmarks, including Audio MultiChallenge, Big Bench Audio, MMSU, MMAU, Spoken MQA, Step-Caption, Step-DU, and Step-SPQA.
Step-Audio-R1.5 substantially outperforms its predecessor and remains highly competitive with state-of-the-art commercial systems such as Gemini 3 Pro.
